text: >> Hello. Hi, good morning. This is Evelyn, so I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Tennessee State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? >> Yes. So I was asking if you received the notification about the pending credits on your Medicare plan.
